title: WRAPAROUND FACILITATION WITH PEER SUPPORT - 211info
text: DIRECTION SERVICE WRAPAROUND FACILITATION WITH PEER SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wraparound services. Service includes a long-term, intensive planning process that follows a series of steps to help youth and their families reach their individual goals. Wraparound facilitators lead monthly team meetings and provide information on community resources. Peer support is offered to both youth and caregivers within the wraparound process. 1144 Gateway Loop Suite 200 Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Ages 0-20 with behavioral challenges or emotional needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 686-5060 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-5060 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Special Education Plan Development Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATION TEAM INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - NATIONAL CENTER FOR APPROPRIATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION IN SPECIAL EDUCATION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIRECTION SERVICE
